description: Chinese-American criminal organization formed as a labor organization in New York City's Chinatown around 1904. Involved in Tong wars with rivals like On Leong Tong, and later drug trafficking with the Kuomintang and OPC. Established chapters across the US, with some branches transitioning to legitimate fraternal organizations.

country_links.evidence_quote: They would later establish chapters in Chinese-American communities throughout the United States in major cities such as Chicago , Seattle and San Francisco...
country_links.context: The organization established chapters in multiple U.S. cities and was involved in drug trafficking and Tong wars there.
